containerDefinitions.name: knowledge-ingest
command: yum install -y python3 python3-pip awscli >/tmp/install.log && pip3 install urllib3 >/tmp/pip.log && mkdir -p /tmp/ingest && aws s3 cp s3://alochat-dev-raw-payloads-668778694151/scripts/ingest_storage.py /tmp/ingest/ingest_storage.py && aws s3 cp s3://alochat-dev-raw-payloads-668778694151/data/storage_inventory_50items_2026.txt /tmp/ingest/storage_inventory_50items_2026.txt && python3 /tmp/ingest/ingest_storage.py /tmp/ingest/storage_inventory_50items_2026.txt --endpoint https://1ta56cm25m7q4g4e4oxd.us-east-1.aoss.amazonaws.com --index kb_corpus --region us-east-1 --tenant acme && rm -rf /tmp/ingest
